{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42275", "cvss": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-61", "name": "UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following"}], "description": "**Summary**
The zrok WebDAV drive backend (davServer.Dir) restricts path traversal through lexical normalization but does not prevent symlink following. When a symbolic link inside the shared DriveRoot points to a location outside that root, remote WebDAV consumers can read files and—on shares without OS-level permission restrictions—write or overwrite files anywhere on the host filesystem accessible to the zrok process.

- Attack Vector: Network — exploitation is performed entirely over the WebDAV endpoint; the attacker issues HTTP requests to the public zrok share URL.
- Attack Complexity: High — a precondition outside the attacker's direct control must hold: a symlink pointing outside DriveRoot must already exist within it (created locally, not via WebDAV).
- Privileges Required: None — zrok share public --backend-mode drive exposes the WebDAV endpoint with no authentication by default.
- User Interaction: None — once the symlink precondition is met, exploitation requires no user interaction.
- Scope: Changed — the vulnerability allows an attacker to escape the WebDAV root (the security boundary) and access the broader host filesystem.
- Confidentiality Impact: High — arbitrary files readable by the zrok process can be retrieved.
- Integrity Impact: High — the WebDAV PUT handler opens files with O_RDWR|O_CREATE|O_TRUNC, meaning symlink targets outside DriveRoot can be overwritten (e.g. ~/.ssh/authorized_keys).
- Availability Impact: None — no direct availability impact.

Affected Components

- drives/davServer/file.go — Dir.OpenFile (line 140), Dir.Stat (line 176), Dir.Mkdir (line 133), Dir.RemoveAll (line 151)
- endpoints/drive/backend.go — NewBackend (line 51–52)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0033, "percentile": 0.24581}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:34:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42275"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T04:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:34:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openziti/zrok/security/advisories/GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42275", "https://github.com/openziti/zrok/commit/459bcfc1e121decae1b1d11c37ad94e4ed5bbf2e", "https://github.com/openziti/zrok/releases/tag/v2.0.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openziti/zrok/security-advisories/GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openziti/zrok", "summary": "zrok: WebDAV drive backend follows symlinks outside DriveRoot, enabling host filesystem read/write", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:29:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-74m3-9qvm-rp9h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openziti/zrok"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.1.11"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openziti/zrok/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: zrok: WebDAV drive backend follows symlinks outside DriveRoot, enabling host filesystem read/write
